description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant featuring broad, dark green leaves with prominent white veins, arranged in a natural, upward-spreading pattern. The leaves are attached to a central, woody stem that emerges from a round, white ceramic pot filled with dark soil. The pot has a smooth, glossy finish and a simple, cylindrical shape with no visible decorative elements. The plant appears healthy and robust, with leaves of varying sizes and some gentle curvature, giving it a lifelike appearance. The overall design suggests a modern, minimalist aesthetic suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments. No plant identification label or tag is visible on the pot or plant.
description: A medium-sized potted plant with broad, dark green leaves and white veins, set in a smooth, white ceramic pot filled with soil. The plant has a natural, upward growth and a modern, minimalist look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plant's broad leaves fanning out from the central stem, with the white ceramic pot clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the layered arrangement of the leaves and the curvature of the uppermost leaf.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the leaves and the central stem, with the pot's cylindrical shape still prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plant's leaf spread and the pot's smooth, glossy surface.
